description: Background options for Rolemaster character creation — merged from Character Law, Companions I & III
generated_notes: Character Law + Companion I: extracted by Claude from PDFs and normalized tables
Companion II: confirmed by GPT as having no background options section
Companion III: section 5.3 Innate Stat Abilities extracted and normalized by GPT

sources.name: Character Law
sources.reference: RM Classic / RM2 Character Law, Chapter 6

entries.name_en: A language to skill rank 10 spoken and written
entries.name_fr: Une langue au rang 10 (parlé et écrit)

entries.name_en: Increase one stat by 2 or three stats by 1 each (temp and pot, max 101)
entries.name_fr: +2 à une stat OU +1 à trois stats (temp et pot, max 101)

entries.name_en: Skill rank 5 in a random secondary skill (or GM chosen)
entries.name_fr: Rang 5 dans une compétence secondaire aléatoire (ou choisie par le MJ)

entries.name_en: Unusual Tongue (optional - speak a normally impossible language)
entries.name_fr: Langue inhabituelle (optionnel - parler une langue normalement impossible)

entries.name_en: Offset Racial Flaw (optional - cancel one racial flaw)

entries.special_item: Onebread,poison,orherbfromthe Enchanted Herbs, Breads,and Poisons Price Tableonpages113-118.The GM mayrequirearandomrollorpermitthe P Ctoselectone.

entries.description_en: All bleeding results are doubled.
Base (40 - SD Mod)% chance of responding to insult or offense with a killing fit.
Accused of Murder, Banditry, Assassination, Theft, Assault, or Treason.
PC experiences severe guilt if he causes the death or injury of a human, Elf, Hobbit, or Dwarf.
Will never fight in an unchivalrous manner; always gives opponent first initiative, never fights horseback vs foot, always allows enemy to rearm.
Base (40 - SD Mod)% chance of charging heedless into a combat situation.
PC is victim of a terrible phobia. Details determined by the GM.
The PC is a faithful vassal to a very wicked Lord or Lady.
The PC is superstitious: his morale is influenced by bad 'omens'.
-15 to all OB's until he gets 'worked up'. May roll once each turn, (20 + SD Mod)% chance.
If non-monk, may train in Martial Arts, Adrenal Moves, and Adrenal Defense as if he were a Monk. If Monk, no penalty when using weapon kata.
25% increase to all bow ranges.
Stalk and Hide skill bonus modified by +25.
+25 modification to all Adrenal Moves rolls.
+25 bonus to riding bonuses.
The PC has been knighted for a personal act of heroism on behalf of a noble or royalty.
All armor development costs are cut in half.
May run at up to 3x normal movement rate and spend only 1 exhaustion point every 60 rounds.
May develop skill ranks in one similar weapons category; all weapons in that category may use that skill rank for their OB's.
Ambush development costs are cut in half.
Half development point cost for Body Development. Maximum racial body hits are increased by 50%.
Hands hit as maces when using MA Strikes skill; treat as a 'Mace' weapon kata with no penalty.
May modify any die roll directly concerning the character by either +5 or -5.
One selected category of weapons yields 3 skill ranks for every 2 developed. All other weapon dev costs increased by 50%.
May intentionally attempt to disarm opponent. Subtract enemy OB from PC OB; add open-ended roll; if 101+ enemy must roll RR vs PC level or lose weapon.
Immune to fear and charm attacks. Sleep attacks are halved for attack level and duration.
May take 150% of total hit points before becoming unconscious.
PC's injuries heal twice as quickly as normal.
Resists magic at 3x level. May not use spells or spell devices.
Vegetarian; has (35 + Em Mod)% chance each round of befriending any animal within 10' if concentrating. May not control animal, but animal will act friendly.
Has an open-ended chance equal to his IN modification to receive information directly from the GM concerning an immediate tactical situation.
Readies weapons and bows 1 round quicker than normal.
May make MA Rank 1 Sweeps/Throws attack each round in addition to normal action.
GM may warn of general danger on a roll less than or equal to the PC's IN modification.
PC may make perception rolls to wake and take action immediately from normal sleep.
Those who are allies, troops, or henchmen under the PC never panic while he is well & in sight.
PC may prepare as for the adrenal move 'Strength' except that his chance of success is his level + ((SD Mod + EM Mod)/2). If he succeeds, his OB and DB are modified by +15 for the next round.
Gets +50 to all forage, fire starting, and locate shelter rolls while outdoors. +20 to all Tracking, Trapping, and Stalk/Hide rolls while outdoors.
Encumbrance Penalties are halved for the PC.
Liked by a very high ranking noble. May be a relative.
PC enjoys the favor of a particular god, demi-god, angel, etc.
May determine the pluses or minuses, magical and non-magical, on weapons and armor.
When using entire OB to parry, the OB is modified by an additional +25.
+15 to AG modification.
+15 to SD modification.
+15 to QU modification.
+15 to CO modification.
+15 to ST modification.
+20 to AG modification.
+20 to SD modification.
+20 to QU modification.
+20 to CO modification.
+20 to ST modification.
+20 to AG, SD, QU, CO, or ST modification (GM choice: assign, PC choice, or random).
PC is tempted to the 'Dark Side'. He learns one Evil spell list to 50th level. GM controls details.
Roll non-attack spell failures as attack spell failures. Add +10 to the roll for attack spell failures.
Deep irrational hatred for one GM chosen race.
Subject to temporary fits of demonic possession. Weekly chance = 5%.
This is the uncontrollable, bestial, psychotic type.
PC becomes a lich or powerful vampire when his soul departs his body.
Any time the PC casts a spell that is over 8th level, the PC suffers 5 points concussion damage.
Instead of following normal attack spell failure procedure, the attack works on the nearest friend or associate within range.
The PC has the disfavor of a particular god, demi-god, demon, etc.
PC has uncontrollable split personality. Must prepare character sheets for 1-3 additional personalities. Stats, levels, classes can vary.
PC is not penalized for wearing armor while casting spells.
+10 bonus on Base Attack or Elemental Spell rolls.
PC receives a +25 bonus for RR's for any 1 realm.
PC knows any 1 spell list to 50th level. May be from any realm or profession.
PC requires one less round of preparation than normal to cast a spell.
PC gets +25 on all Staves/Wands rolls.
PC gets +25 on all scrolls and runes rolls.
PC gets +25 bonus to his meditation skill bonus.
PC gets one additional power point each level.
Concentration spells continue after the caster ceases concentrating for a period equal to the number of rounds he originally spent concentrating.
PC has abilities similar to an Archmage. Dev point costs are now the same as any one hybrid spell user. Base lists don't change, but may make spell picks as a hybrid for all three realms.
PC may see invisible or ethereal items if he concentrates.
PC's neck hairs prickle around a great power source, enchanted location, etc.
PC receives spontaneous glimpses of events associated with a place, person, item, etc. that he touches.
May learn the Arcane Spell Lists as if they were his base lists.
PC has a high-level non-alchemist magic user as a good friend.
As '26' except friend is an Alchemist who will make or sell items to the PC for 51-100% of normal cost.
10% chance of determining each ability of a magic item. Roll each characteristic.
Without a spell bonus item or with a PP adder, the PC normally has 2x normal Power Points. If using a PP multiplier, the bonus increases 1 level (x2→x3, etc.).
PC may designate 1 spell list on which he never needs to make an Extraordinary Spell Failure roll.
PC has an additional set of Power Points based on his PR stat to use with the lists in Future Law. May be developed as if a 'Semi-telepath'.
+15 to PR modification.
+15 to IN modification.
+15 to EM modification.
+15 to ME modification.
+15 to RE modification.
+20 to PR modification.
+20 to IN modification.
+20 to EM modification.
+20 to ME modification.
+20 to RE modification.
+20 to PR, IN, EM, ME, or RE modification (GM choice).

sources.name: Companion II
sources.note: La table des matieres et le contenu montrent des professions optionnelles, des voies des sorts, des regles optionnelles sur les competences, la resolution des actions, le monde des esprits et des descriptions de competences, mais pas de section equivalente a des options d'historique ou a des talents par statistique.

sources.name: Companion III

Group C.selection: 1 C pick or 1 B pick and 2 A picks

general_notes: Abilities are split by stat into Group A, Group B, and Group C.
Some entries are direct references to background options; others are spell-like or unique talents.
Spell-like abilities may be used an unlimited number of times per day unless a limit is stated, but only once per round.

entries.description_en: Unnatural Stamina as the background option.
Tolerance as the background option.
Healing occurs at twice the normal rate.

entries.name_en: No Stat Loss on Level Gain
entries.description_en: Stat loss (due to stress) never occurs upon gaining a level; i.e., stat gain rolls of 01-04 are ignored.
Clotting I as the spell, once per round.
Natural Physique as the background option.
Pain Relief I as the spell.
Major Fracture/Cartilage Repair as the Healer spell.
Muscle/Tendon Repair as the Healer spell.
Preservation as the Cleric spell, 1 hour per level duration.
Cut Repair I as the spell.
Healing occurs at three times the normal rate (not cumulative with Accelerated Healing I).
Skin toughens to AT 3 permanently.
Poison/Disease Resistance I as the Open Channeling spell.
Stuns accumulated from each blow taken are reduced by one round.
Undisease/Unpoison as the Open Channeling spell, usable 5 times per day.
Cancel True as the Closed Essence spell, usable 5 times per day. Alternatively, only one realm may be cancelled but this ability may be used once per round an unlimited number of times per day.
Major Vessel Repair I as the Healer spell.
Major Fracture Repair True as the Healer spell.
Muscle/Tendon Repair True as the Healer spell.
All criticals taken are reduced one level in severity.
Natural Facility with Armor as the background option.
Body Control as the Nightblade spell.
Landing (10' per level) as the Closed Mentalism spell.
Edgerunning as the Monk spell.
All fumble ranges are halved (round down).
All one-handed melee weapons that character has proficiency in may be used in either or both hands; no cost for this two-weapon combination.
Weapon Kata penalties are eliminated.
Directed elemental attack spells may be parried using melee OBs and a weapon/shield.
Agile parrying ability causes opponents to resist vs. character's level or be disarmed if the character uses at least half of his OB to parry.
Scope Skill (choose directed or nondirected spells); otherwise as the background option.
Penalties for engaging in multiple melee attacks are reduced by 50%.
All missile, directed spell, or melee criticals delivered increase one level in severity.
Open-ended high (OEH) roll range for rolls involving skills that receive an AG bonus becomes 91-100.
Open-ended low (OEL) range for rolls involving skills that receive an AG bonus becomes 01-02.
Courage as the Paladin spell.
Levitation as the Closed Essence spell.
Meditation III as the Shaman spell.
Unpain 50% as the Open Mentalism spell.
When frenzied, defense is normal and crits are reduced one level. A total roll of 116 is needed to achieve this state.
Adds +50 to RRs versus any mind-influencing spells.
Stuns accumulated from each blow taken are reduced by one round.
Concentration II as the Monk spell.
Unpain 100% as the Open Mentalism spell.
Unpresence as the Mystic spell.
As Improved Frenzy, but instantaneous spells may be cast while frenzied, crits are reduced two levels, and a roll of 131 must be attained.
Mountain Heart I as the Nightblade spell, usable 3 times per day.
Temporal Skill as the background option.
Additional +15 bonus to all RRs that can be actively resisted (i.e., nonsubtle attacks).
Self-Keeping as the Monk spell.
Total Recall as the Closed Mentalism spell.
All languages are learned at half-cost (and time).
Study I as the Bard spell.
Permanent 5% bonus to all earned experience.
Allows two chosen skills to be developed at half cost, subject to GM approval. Skills must be specific; examples: martial arts striking, a certain spell list, or acrobatics.
Subconscious Discipline as the background option.
Spell Store as the Closed Essence spell, except one other spell may be cast before the stored spell.
Permanent 10% bonus to earned experience (noncumulative with Earned Experience +5%).
Permanent 15% bonus to earned experience (noncumulative with lower experience bonuses).
Permanent +10 bonus to all actions that must have been previously seen or attempted.
Tactician as the background option (substitute reasoning for intuition).
Judge of Weaponry as the background option.
Detect Lie (50% chance per lie).
Observation as the Closed Mentalism spell.
Calculate II as the Sage spell.
Awareness as the Mentalist spell.
Clever attacking strategies increase effectiveness of martial art ranks used by one factor.
Correlate as the Closed Mentalism spell.
Detect Illusion as the Monk spell.
Calculate III as the Sage spell.
Weigh Decision (45% bias) as the Sage spell.
Ambush skill rank increases 50% and is one-half cost thereafter.
Awareness True as the Mentalist spell.
Complete understanding of one race allows crits against the race to be 'Slaying'.
Armor minimum maneuver penalties are halved.
Hammerhand as the background option.
All missile ranges increase 50%.
Criticals delivered also yield Unbalancing crits (2 degrees less severity).
Allows 2-handed weapons to be wielded in one hand at a -25 penalty. Two-weapon combo is unusable when employing this ability.
Yields Krush crits the following round after grappling a target.
All melee strikes yield double concussion damage.
All missile strikes yield double concussion damage.
May throw objects as a giant would, with a 200' range. Skill must be developed.
50% of all strikes made with blunt weapons are 'Shattering'.
Yields ability to throw weight into blows, inflicting additional Impact crits in melee.
Items as strong as Mithril may be bent/broken if the item fails an RR.
50% of all strikes made with edged weapons are 'Cleaving'.
Adds +5 to all OBs and non-rear DBs (includes DB versus elemental attack spells).
Allow negation of 1 surprise or disorientation round.
Subtracts 5 from all criticals taken if the character is aware of the attack.
Gives an additional 10% activity each round.
Ability to change facing in melee prevents the character from being flanked/attacked from rear by less than 3 opponents if aware of them.
As Fluidity, but the bonus is +10 instead of +5.
Opponent's Quickness and/or adrenal defense may be negated 50% of the time if the opponent possesses quickness below 102.
Character may act one combat phase earlier (e.g. fire a missile in the spell phase); a penalty of -30 to first swing points (FSP) is applied when this ability is used.
As Efficiency, but the additional activity is 20%.
As Fluidity, but the bonus is +15 instead of +5.
Dodging III as the Monk spell.
Spell Dodge II as the Nightblade spell.
As Efficiency, but the additional activity is 40%.
Look of Eagles as the background option.
Suggestion as the Closed Essence spell; targets gain a +30 to resist.
Mind Merge as the Mentalist spell.
Mind Shield as the Open Mentalism spell.
Inner Thoughts as the Mentalist spell.
Mind Voice 100' as the Mentalist spell.
Look of Terror I as the Warlock spell.
Aggression as the background option, except it applies to all attack rolls.
Inner Wall V as the Closed Mentalism spell.
Aura as the background option.
Lifekeeping (1 hour per level) as the Cleric spell.
Charm Kind as the Mentalist spell; targets gain a +30 to RRs.
Hold Kind as the Mentalist spell.
Inspirations II as the Paladin spell.
Misfeel True as the Mystic spell.
Control Demon V as the Evil Magician spell.
Master of Kind as the Mentalist spell; targets gain a +30 to RRs.
Ability to externalize mind force allows the caster to simulate the effects of the Mentalist spell Shock E twice per day. Alternatively, 'Shattering' may be used.
Dream I as the Cleric spell.
Divination as the secondary skill, 80% chance of success.
Direction Sense as the background option.
Guess as the Cleric spell.
Provides a +50 bonus to the skill Spatial Location Awareness.
Intuitive understanding of the near future bestows a +10 bonus to all DBs, including rear DBs.
Awakening as the Monk spell.
Intuitions V as the Cleric spell.
Detect Ambush as the Ranger spell.
Channel Opening (10 miles per level) as the Cleric spell.
Luck as the background option.
Destiny Sense as the background option.
Dangersense as the background option.
A special tie to deity allows use of the Dervish spell Dance of Fervor once per week.
Anticipate True as the Open Mentalism spell.
Animal Friendship as the background option.
Mind Typing as the Mentalist spell.
Emotions as the Mentalist spell.
As Detect Channeling, but applies to all realms.
Mana Sensing as the background option.
Presence, Feel, and Mind Store as the Mentalist spells.
Location 500' as the Open Channeling spell.
Visions as the background option.
Mana Reading as the background option, except there is only a 50% chance for each ability.
Awareness as the Mentalist spell.
Neutralize Curse (1 minute per level) as the Cleric spell.
Analysis as the Open Essence spell.
Transcendence as the background option.
Spatial Skill as the background option.
Detect True as the Open Essence spell.
Ensorcellment Cure as the background option.

Power may be leeched from an earthnode, item, or person imbued with Essence power; rate of drain is 10 PP per round and user must make a BAR vs unwilling targets, who then make an RR to attempt to resist the draining. Concentration must be maintained during each round of the drain.
